prompts: Japanese fantasy RPG guild tavern, Celestia Vale in a modest travel dress and Ren Moonvale in reinforced leather armor; Celestia kneels gracefully by a wooden tavern table, extending a soothing hand toward a small glowing mana hound hiding in the shadows beneath. Ren stands slightly behind her, holding a lantern low to cast soft, warm light on the creature. Anime style, high-quality character design, calm atmosphere, no text, no watermark.

Same continuous shot in the Japanese fantasy guild tavern; Ren gently kneels beside Celestia, extending his hand to offer a piece of dried meat to the mana hound. The creature, sensing their non-threatening presence, slowly emerges from the shadows, its glow dimming into a soft, calming light. Celestia and Ren share a relieved, cooperative smile as they successfully soothe the creature. Consistent characters and lighting, anime style, no text, no watermark.
